name: 1997-dw-competitive-advantage-through-pr-b307c7
title: Competitive Advantage Through Prism Metadata Scalability
description: Aberdeen Group vendor profile of Prism Solutions Inc. (June 1997), evaluating its metadata-driven data warehouse software. Covers Prism Warehouse Executive, Prism Warehouse Directory, Prism Iterations methodology, Web Access and Personal Mart modules. Prism acquired by Ardent for $42M in Jan 1999; lineage continues in IBM InfoSphere DataStage.
